title: RaySteal
description: ❤️‍🩹 A complete Lifesteal plugin for Spigot & Paper. Steal hearts from other players, craft powerful items, and revive friends from a unique "ghost" 👻 state!
body:
# RaySteal: The Ultimate Lifesteal Core
RaySteal is a complete Lifesteal Core plugin for Spigot & Paper servers, designed for Minecraft 1.21+. It transforms survival gameplay by linking player health directly to combat. Gain hearts by defeating your enemies, but be careful—losing a fight will cost you your own!

This plugin is designed to be a drag-and-drop solution for any server wanting to add a high-stakes Lifesteal mechanic.

---

### ❤️ Core Features
* **Heart Stealing:** Slay other players to steal their hearts and increase your maximum health.
* **High-Stakes PvP:** Losing hearts makes you weaker, creating intense and meaningful combat.
* **Unique Elimination System:** When a player runs out of hearts, they aren't banned. They become a "ghost" in a purgatory-like state—weak and unable to interact with the world until a friend revives them.
* **Craftable Items:** Craft powerful "Hearts" to permanently increase your health and legendary "Revival Totems" to bring your eliminated friends back from the brink.
* **Interactive GUIs:** Use the Revival Totem to open a menu of eliminated players, or use `/rs recipe` to see how to craft the custom items.
* **Configurable Sounds:** Every command and action has a configurable sound effect for immersive feedback.
* **Fully Configurable:** Almost everything can be changed in the config files, from crafting recipes to sound effects and heart drop rules.
* **HD Texture Pack Ready:** Full support for custom textures via `CustomModelData`.

---

### 📖 Commands & Permissions
The main command is `/raysteal` or `/rs`.

#### Player Commands (`raysteal.use` - default)
* `/rs help` - Shows a clickable list of all commands.
* `/rs hearts [player]` - Check your own or another player's hearts.
* `/rs withdraw <amount>` - Convert your life force into physical heart items.
* `/rs recipe` - Opens a GUI showing the crafting recipes.

#### Admin Commands (`raysteal.admin`)
* `/rs revive <player>` - Revive an eliminated player.
* `/rs sethearts <player> <amount>` - Set a player's max hearts.
* `/rs giveheart <player> <amount>` - Give heart items to a player.
* `/rs setdeathloc` - Sets the location where eliminated players are sent.
* `/rs reload` - Reloads the configuration files.

---

### 🛠️ Crafting Recipes

**Default Heart Recipe:**

![Default Heart Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75e0d9dac3a0b311b7eca9aa33f8c8797717b6af.png)

![Default Revival Totem Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9655962ba1972922114a50b8fecfbcadf650225.png)

---
### 🔧 Setup
1.  Drop the `RaySteal.jar` into your server's `plugins` folder.
2.  Start your server to generate the default configuration files.
3.  **(Admin)** Use `/rs setdeathloc` at the location where you want eliminated players to be sent.
4.  Enjoy the chaos!
